EmailTemplate.name: Runwal Gardens Payment Reconciliation II
EmailTemplate.subject: Possession Intimation email
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Booking__c.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Gardens!!
We are happy to inform you that your Flat at Runwal Gardens is in final stage of completion, and we will be initiating the possession formalities towards your Dream Home Shortly.
As a precursor to possessions, we are starting with the reconciliation of your accounts.
We hereby request you to provide us your details of payment made towards your unit till date.
This includes the following:
1 Bank Statements of payments made to Runwal (Highlighted) towards your unit. 2 TDS Certificates 3 Online Payments detail (NEFT / RTGS / IMPS) 4 Loan Statement of payments made to Runwal through Bank Loan
Request you to kindly share the same at the earliest for us to initiate the reconciliation process of your payments made towards your unit.
Please ignore this email if statements / proofs have been already shared.
You can either reply to this email or write to us on possessiongardens@runwalgroup.in
Warm Regards, Runwal Gardens Possessions Team
